title: Season management
warningHeading: ⚠ CAUTION: This action has far-reaching consequences
warningTmUsers: All TM users will be locked out on their next login, as their teams no longer belong to the active season.
warningLicenses: Player licenses from the old season lose their validity for new game reports.
warningSbkUsers: SBK users must create new leagues; clubs must re-register their teams.
